2: For they be they be many that fight against me, O thou most High.
4: In God I have put my trust; I will not fear what flesh can do unto me.
5: All their thoughts are are against me for evil.
6: They mark my steps, when they wait for my soul.
7: In thine thine anger cast down the people, O God.
8: Are they Are they not in thy book?
9: This I know; for God is is for me.
10: In the LORD LORD will I praise his his word.
11: I will not be afraid what man can do unto me.
12: I will render praises unto thee.
13: That I may walk before God in the light of the living?
